# EclipseSystems

> EclipseSystems is a game server and application hosting platform. Deploy Minecraft, Rust, CS2, Discord bots, web apps, and more across a globally distributed node network. Managed through EcliPanel, our open-source control panel with Wings and Proxmox VE support.

EclipseSystems provides managed hosting with automated provisioning, DDoS protection, competitive ELO-ranked servers, KVM virtual machines, and one-click app deployments. The platform is built on EcliPanel — an open-source panel (Next.js 16, Tailwind CSS v4, Node.js/Express backend, PostgreSQL) — with a dark-first design system and 14 theme variants.

For the full API, see the OpenAPI spec at https://backend.ecli.app/openapi.

## Hosting & Products

- [Getting Started](https://ecli.app/docs/getting-started): Quick start for new EclipseSystems customers
- [Server Management](https://ecli.app/docs/server-management): Console, files, databases, power controls, backups
- [KVM Hosting](https://ecli.app/docs/kvm): KVM virtual machine provisioning and control
- [One-Click Apps](https://ecli.app/docs/deploying-apps): Deploy Discord bots, web apps, game servers in one click
- [ELO Servers](https://ecli.app/elo): Competitive hosting — climb ranks, scale from 256 MB to 24 GB RAM
- [SMARTNET DDoS Protection](https://ecli.app): Always-on DDoS mitigation with PlexT integration
- [Sunset Migration](https://ecli.app/docs/sunset): Migration guide for legacy server plans

## Platform & Development

- [EcliPanel on GitHub](https://github.com/thenoname-gurl/EcliPanel): Open-source panel source code and issue tracker
- [OpenAPI Spec](https://backend.ecli.app/openapi): Full REST API reference
- [Status](https://ecli.app/status): Network and node uptime monitoring
